working_on: Cleanup-batch session: close 3 health-check-finding Issues (#50 hook env-pointer worktree fallback, #55 audit_mempalace [pushback]/[lesson] content-prefix matching, #51 new audit_orphan_ok_list() per cascade-discipline.md commitment). outcome_summary: S-0099 closed three health-check-finding Issues end-to-end. #50: engine/tools/hooks/session-start.sh env-pointer probe extended with parent-repo fallback via git rev-parse --git-common-dir + dirname (idempotent for non-worktree sessions); 6 new pytests in test_session_start_env_pointer.py against real git-worktree-shaped tmp_path fixtures; verified empirically from this worktree (LOUD pointer no longer fires). #55: audit_mempalace() pushback/lesson counter loop extended with content-prefix matching path; drawers with line beginning [<tag>] (case-insensitive, leading whitespace OK) count alongside Tags-line drawers; deduplicated; 5 new pytests covering the new path + edge cases + parallel lesson + false-positive guard preserved. #51: new audit_orphan_ok_list() function (199 LOC including 2 helpers) walks engine/adr/[0-9]*.md + product/adr/[0-9]*.md for Accepted ADRs with `- **Orphan-OK:** <reason>; revisit at <S-NNNN-or-Phase-N>` per cascade-discipline.md line 88; surfaces stale + malformed + cannot-evaluate cases; folded into audit_gaps(); 12 new pytests covering all eight branches + Layer 1 contract docstring + Layer 3 cold-context review per ADR 0038; corpus-today empirical baseline 0 findings. Validator at shutdown: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns 375 (was 378 at eager-claim — issue_collision 12→9 as Closes #NN commits landed; Phase-5 carryover 366 unchanged). All 1022 pytests pass. Per user direction at boot, 5 more Issues queued for additional sessions today: #54, #52, #53, #48, #49 (recommended order with #53 AFTER S-0099 since #51/#55 add code to health_check.py that #53's main()-rewire under ADR 0057 TEMPLATE.md will integrate). MemPalace decision drawer captured.
declared_scope: Close GitHub Issues #50, #55, #51 inline. Issue #50: extend session-start.sh env-pointer probe (lines 262-294) to fall back to parent main repo .env via git rev-parse --git-common-dir + dirname when worktree .env is absent or lacks SUPABASE_DB_URL; preserve LOUD pointer when neither location carries the URL (Issue #7 / S-0048 contract). Issue #55: extend audit_mempalace() pushback/lesson counter loop in health_check.py (lines 1140-1176) to also match drawers whose first non-empty content line begins with [pushback]/[lesson] (case-insensitive); deduplicate with existing Tags-line match; preserve existing path. Issue #51: add new audit_orphan_ok_list() function to health_check.py walking engine/adr/[0-9]*.md and product/adr/[0-9]*.md, parsing - **Orphan-OK:** <reason>; revisit at <S-NNNN-or-Phase-N> annotations on Accepted ADRs, comparing trigger against register_state.json:last_claimed (session-id) or STATE.md current-phase (phase trigger), surfacing stale annotations as findings; wire into main(); empty-corpus today by design. Pytest extensions for all three. Layer 1 contract docstring on the new function per ADR 0038. Layer 3 cold-context review at shutdown. Standard close: STATE.md, ENGINE_LOG.md, archive S-0099.json, MemPalace diary write, validate.py 0 hard-fails.
